meaning: adj.通用的,万能的,多才多艺的,多面手的
examples: He is sparkling and versatile in front of the camera.
He is a nimble and versatile wit.
The chemical giant wanted a polypropylene versatile enough to go from stiff to soft.
Bireli is versatile: You'll hear his love for American guitarist Wes Montgomery and even Frank Sinatra.
